---
title: '404 Error Page'
date: '1994-01-02T07:39:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '204892069548167569'
blogger_filename: '/1994/01/404-error-page.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'TechSetUp'
---

<h3>
<span style="font-size: medium;">You got a 404 Error? Can't find the page you were looking for?</span></h3>
<span style="font-size: medium;"><br /></span>
<span style="font-size: medium;"><i><br /></i></span>
<br />
<h4>
<span style="font-size: medium;"><i>I'm sorry about that.&nbsp;</i></span></h4>
<br />
<br />
<br />
You can search this site for the right page, or email Me@DarrellWolfe.com and tell me what you were trying to find.<br />
<br />
<br />
Click <a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/start-here-about.html" target="_blank">Start Here</a> if you're new here, or <a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/by-darrell.html" target="_blank">The Hub</a> for a list of all my sites.<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
Or just watch this <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=705OzYq7cXU" target="_blank">cat in slow motion</a>&nbsp;by The Slow Mo Guys (just for fun) as my gift to you for finding this secret page, thanks for stopping by!<br />
<span style="font-size: medium;"><br /></span>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<iframe allowfullscreen="" frameborder="0" height="300" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/705OzYq7cXU" width="550"></iframe>

<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
Oh by the way... would you like a Hippopotas for Christmas? I do!<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<iframe allowfullscreen="" frameborder="0" height="360" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/tlVPdfaD4Wc" width="480"></iframe>

<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
Thanks for stopping by!<br />
<br />
Darrell
